message:
fix(store): add missing dirty counter increments for stream group mutations

Six stream consumer group operations were mutating state without
incrementing the dirty counter, causing their changes to be silently
excluded from AOF persistence:

- xclaim: PEL ownership transfers now tracked
- xautoclaim: PEL ownership transfers now tracked
- xgroup_create: new group creation now tracked
- xgroup_destroy: group removal now tracked
- xgroup_setid: last-delivered-id change now tracked
- xgroup_createconsumer: new consumer addition now tracked

Without these, XCLAIM/XAUTOCLAIM/XGROUP operations would succeed but
their effects would be lost on server restart (AOF wouldn't capture them).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
